---
name: Feature Request
about: A new capability, gate, dataset, or tooling improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<p>
  <img src="../assets/readme/zpe-masthead.gif" alt="ZPE-Mocap Masthead" width="100%">
</p>

<p>
  <img src="../assets/readme/section-bars/feature-request.svg" alt="FEATURE REQUEST" width="100%">
</p>

**What are you proposing?**
A clear description of the capability, gate, or tooling improvement.

**Which category best describes this?**

- [ ] New dataset or corpus
- [ ] Gate or benchmark extension
- [ ] Search or index capability
- [ ] Retargeting or runtime integration
- [ ] CLI or tooling improvement
- [ ] Other (describe):

**Why does this belong in ZPE-Mocap?**
Explain how this aligns with ZPE-Mocap's scope and evidence discipline.

**Evidence or prior art**
Is there a baseline comparator, dataset, or falsification protocol you would
use to gate this? Proposals without a gating strategy are unlikely to be
accepted.

**Scope discipline check**
Confirm this proposal does not inflate claims beyond codec integrity:

- [ ] Confirmed — no unsupported claims are introduced
